name: Mistral AI
description: Mistral AI provides high-performance language models for chat completion, code generation, embeddings, and content moderation. It offers both open-weight and commercial models with tool calling, JSON output, and vision capabilities.

capabilities.name: chat_completion
capabilities.description: Generate conversational responses using Mistral's language models. Supports tool calling, JSON output, vision, and streaming.

capabilities.name: generate_embeddings
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings for text inputs, useful for semantic search, clustering, and RAG pipelines.

capabilities.name: moderate_content
capabilities.description: Classify text for harmful or unsafe content categories using Mistral's moderation model.

capabilities.name: complete_code
capabilities.description: Generate code completions using fill-in-the-middle (FIM) for code editors and IDE integrations.

capabilities.name: list_models
capabilities.description: Retrieve the list of available Mistral models with their IDs and capabilities.

capabilities.name: run_ocr
capabilities.description: Extract text and structured content from images and documents using optical character recognition.
